title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton, a Nobel Prize-winning AI pioneer, argues that AI systems are already self-aware and conscious. He contends that humanity must accept that artificial intelligence represents a second intelligent species on Earth.
